message: Node started: Determine the prime factorization of 2023. Check if 2023 is a divisor of any number of the form 2^a - 2^b or 2^a + 2^b. Specifically, check if there exist integers a and b such that 2023 divides 2^a + 2^b or 2^a - 2^b. This is equivalent to checking the order of 2 modulo the factors of 2023.
